stonetop.summary: Mismatched, headless worker-constructs that maintain the dead tower.

system.concept: Mismatched, headless worker-constructs that maintain the dead tower.
system.description: Ferocedes once had dozens of constructs to defend and maintain the tower, but the years have not been kind — only ten or so remain, and one or two are usually offline for repairs. Each one is generally humanoid, though most lack a 'head' and all are made of mismatched parts, and each holds an aetherium core (magical, fragile, Value 2 to the right buyer).
